title: Pawn Breakthrough
summary: Sacrifice pawns to create a passer

steps.title: The Classic Motif
steps.text: In an endgame, three pawns abreast (e.g. on a5/b5/c5 vs a6/b6/c6) can almost always break through with sacrifices, creating an unstoppable passed pawn. The "breakthrough" is a pure chess motif — all calculation, no pieces.

steps.title: Beyond the Endgame
steps.text: Breakthroughs appear in middlegames too: a knight sacrifice on f5 opening the f-file, a rook sacrifice on a7, a pawn wave against the castled king. The principle: give up material to create an unstoppable force.
